name: blog_quotation
schema:
CREATE TABLE "blog_quotation" (
   "id" INTEGER,
   "created" TEXT,
   "slug" TEXT,
   "metadata" TEXT,
   "card_image" TEXT,
   "is_draft" INTEGER,
   "quotation" TEXT,
   "source" TEXT,
   "source_url" TEXT,
   "context" TEXT,
   "series_id" INTEGER REFERENCES "blog_series"("id")
)
